name: hero
description: A centred landing hero: eyebrow pill, headline, subtitle, up to two CTAs and optional social proof over a layered gradient backdrop. Content reveals in a staggered upward motion on mount, responsive from mobile up, and the animation collapses to a plain fade under prefers-reduced-motion.

notes: Renders a single h1 for the headline so the page has one clear top-level heading, and labels the section landmark via aria-labelledby
The gradient backdrop and CTA icons are decorative (aria-hidden) and do not affect contrast of the text above them
CTAs render as real links when given an href, otherwise as buttons, so each is keyboard- and screen-reader-accessible
Social proof is built on the ibirdui avatar primitive: each avatar is exposed as a labelled image, announcing the person whether the photo loads or falls back to initials
The entrance animation respects prefers-reduced-motion via MotionProvider

intents: a landing page hero section with a headline and call-to-action
an animated marketing header built on ibirdui
centred hero with eyebrow, title, subtitle and two buttons
examples: <Hero title="Ship accessible UI, fast" subtitle="Designed, animated blocks built on ibirdui." primaryAction={{ label: 'Get started', href: '/docs' }} secondaryAction={{ label: 'GitHub', href: 'https://github.com' }} />
